## SpellcheckButton class

A button that when pressed emits the [XEventsTypes.UserAcceptedAQuery](./x-components.xeventstypes.useracceptedaquery.md) and [XEventsTypes.UserAcceptedSpellcheckQuery](./x-components.xeventstypes.useracceptedspellcheckquery.md) events, expressing the user intention to set the spellchecked query.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class SpellcheckButton extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [spellcheckedQuery](./x-components.spellcheckbutton.spellcheckedquery.md) |  | string | The spellcheckedQuery from the search state. |

## Methods

|  Method | Modifiers | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  [emitEvents()](./x-components.spellcheckbutton.emitevents.md) |  | Emits events when the button is clicked. |
